title: elymus curvatiformis
intro: Elymus curvatiformis is a type of grass plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly known as a medicinal plant, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where its roots and stems are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Elymus curvatiformis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is often prepared in herbal tea, decoction, or tincture form, and is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and promoting digestion.
